{"society_power": 4.5, "state_power": 7.7, "society_change": 0.8, "state_change": 0.2, "key_event": "Swadeshi movement and Bengal partition backlash", "reasoning": "Mass boycott mobilization, a maturing press/middle class, and the state's forced annulment of the Bengal partition mark a real leap in societal capacity beyond elite petitioning, though the Surat Split and communal fragmentation cap the gain; the state's administrative reach grew modestly but was checked by having to reverse course under pressure."}
